item.name: customer
item.description: Customer management endpoints: registration, login, profile update, and verification.

item.name: create-passenger
item.description: Create a new passenger for a customer. Required: name, phone_number. Returns passenger details.

item.name: onboard-initiate
item.description: Initiate onboarding for a customer. Required: phone_number. Triggers OTP send.

item.name: register-with-otp
item.description: Register a customer with OTP verification. Required: name, email, phone_number, otp, dob, gender, emergency contact info. Returns customer profile.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Ayan Chax",
  "email": "ayanchax9088@gmail.com",
  "phone_number": "+919831305667",
  "otp": "1984",
  "dob": "1988-08-03T00:00:00Z",
  "gender": "male",
  "emergency_contact_name": "Oyendrila Majumdar",
  "emergency_contact_number": "+91 8017084241",
  "opt_in_updates": true
}

item.name: get_active_customer
item.description: Get active customer profile by customer_id. Required: phone_number. Returns customer details.

item.name: update_customer
item.description: Update customer profile. Required: name, email. Returns updated customer info.

item.name: login-initiate
item.description: Initiate login for a customer. Required: phone_number. Triggers OTP send.

item.name: login
item.description: Login with phone_number and OTP. Returns authentication token.

item.name: logout
item.description: Logout the current customer. Requires authentication.

item.name: email-verification-initiate
item.description: Initiate email verification for customer. Sends verification email.

item.name: verify-email
item.description: Verify customer email using token. Required: customer_id, token. Returns verification status.

item.name: upload-profile-picture
item.description: Upload profile picture for customer. Required: file. Returns upload status.

item.name: remove-profile-picture
item.description: Remove profile picture for customer. Returns removal status.

item.name: seeding
item.description: Endpoints for generating and managing seed data for development and testing.

item.name: generate-seed-data
item.description: Generate seed data for testing. Requires authentication. Returns seed status.

item.name: trip
item.description: Trip search, booking, and payment endpoints. Organized by trip type and workflow.

item.name: search
item.description: Endpoints for searching available trips by type (outstation, local, airport). Each request returns available options and pricing.

item.name: outstation-suv-diesel-with-single-hop
